commands.payload:
sln-tool 1.1.0
Copyright (c) 2021 itsresool

  examples    Show usage examples

  add         Add files to solution folder

  remove      Remove files from solution folder

  list        List solution folders

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.

result.stderr:
sln-tool 1.1.0
Copyright (c) 2021 itsresool

  -f, --sln-folder    (Default: Solution Items) Name of solution folder that
                      will store your files

  -n, --sln-name      Name of solution file (if empty will use first .sln file
                      it founds)

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

  files (pos. 0)      Files to add. Paths need to be relative to sln file
